## Scope

- [ ] Affects core (`@lit-pigeon/core`)
- [ ] Affects editor UI (`@lit-pigeon/editor`)
- [ ] Affects renderer (`@lit-pigeon/renderer-mjml`)
- [ ] Affects parser (`@lit-pigeon/parser-mjml`)
- [ ] Affects a framework wrapper (`@lit-pigeon/react`, `angular`, etc.)
- [ ] Affects docs / website
